name: bookkeepers managing 10–50 clients monthly tool
description: For bookkeepers managing 10–50 clients monthly, frequent mismatches cause cash flow gaps. We automate the matching process instead of manual reconciliation of bank statements and ledgers.
problem_solved: frequent mismatches between bank statements and accounting entries

locked_fields.primary_problem: frequent mismatches between bank statements and accounting entries
